title: Repair laminated glass windscreens
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair laminated glass windscreens demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair laminated glass windscreen

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Check size of chip or crack against industry repair standards and identify compliance requirements 1.3 Identify required information for repair activity 1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Check size of chip or crack against industry repair standards and identify compliance requirements 1.3 Identify required information for repair activity 1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Check size of chip or crack against industry repair standards and identify compliance requirements 1.3 Identify required information for repair activity 1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair laminated glass windscreen

elements.title: Repair chipped and cracked laminated glass

pcs.text: Carry out repair process for chipped or cracked glass according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, industry standards and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Finish glass surface according to manufacturer specifications and safety data sheets (SDS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out repair process for chipped or cracked glass according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, industry standards and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Finish glass surface according to manufacturer specifications and safety data sheets (SDS)?

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
